title: Electricity licence exemption: Riverside Energy Park Limited
body: "We’re seeking views on a proposed exemption from the requirement to hold a generation licence in respect of the Riverside 2 Generating Station, a 75 MW plant owned and operated by The Riverside Energy Park Limited.  Please send responses by close of play on 6 August 2025 to:  chris.chown@energysecurity.gov.uk  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
